source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Career Jungler
archetype.receipt: Plays 5 roles but jungle is both the main and the best — 54.3% over 302 games, about 7.7 more wins per 100 than the weakest role. Lean into it.

entries.change: Move the carry games to jungle
Queue jungle instead of the usual mix
entries.receipt: 54.3% there vs 50.1% overall, 302 games of evidence
54.0% over 164 games on Khaimera vs 50.1% overall

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

pool.name: Khaimera
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +33.6% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

pool.name: Argus
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for 10s rotation vs squishies: first spike lands around minute 12 (Spectral Schematics), third item by minute 24. Take Demiurge: +13.9% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

pool.name: Greystone
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 24. Take Krix: +18% on effective HP at minute 15.

pool.name: Murdock
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 24. Take Demiurge: +18.5% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

leanInto.name: Khaimera
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +33.6% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

plan: Keep queueing jungle as primary — it is already Xeebs's usual queue AND best role at 54.3% over 302 games (overall is 50.1%).
Stop queueing carry: 41.8% over 184 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play the safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Khaimera. Compared with the average player on the same hero, Xeebs wins about 2.5 more games per 100 on it.
Xeebs's champion pool is 10+ heroes wide and the top three are only 41% of the games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on the top three.
The math: Xeebs is at 299 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. The all-time peak is 692.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward the player's own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where the player wins, not why

insights.title: Vision is Xeebs's cheapest upgrade
insights.finding: 4.7 wards per game, 56% of the squad average. Wards cost nothing and they are being left in the shop.
insights.receipt: 4,047 placed + 247 cleared over 908 games; squad average 8.4/game

insights.title: Khaimera is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 164 games and Xeebs genuinely out-pilots the field on Khaimera — about 2.5 more wins per 100 games than the average Khaimera player. The hours show.

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out Xeebs's best
insights.finding: Xeebs's record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 246 ranked games — the strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of the squad queue, make it this pair.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: A longest killing spree of 16 in real 5v5s (plus 2 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Xeebs has receipts.
